_comment: Edit this file to change your site theme. Run `python3 build.py` to rebuild.
_logo_comment: CSS text logo rendered via header CSS. img_url kept for build.py compatibility (image hidden by CSS).

fonts._note: @import stripped by WordPress.com Additional CSS. Body copy uses Lora (serif) via header template injection. Headings use system sans-serif stack. To change fonts update the <style> block in the header template part on WP.com.

_color_comment: Warm Slate palette applied 2026-03-06. Colors injected via <style> in header template part on WP.com (overrides CDN global styles). Run `python3 build.py` to apply to static build.
_github_pages_comment: calculator-widget.html is a standalone self-contained page hosted on GitHub Pages. WordPress.com KSES strips <script>/<input>/<iframe> on Personal plan, so the live /peptide-dosage-calculator/ page is a gateway that links here.
_author_comment: Author display name changed from 'Sandor Sklar'. Single Posts template overridden to replace wp:post-author-name with custom HTML mailto link.

author._note: Template override saved in _theme/template-single.html. Single Posts template (pub/blank-canvas-3//single) is now source=custom on WP.com.

_nav_comment: Nav consolidated: Single pep-dose.com + Peptide Stack Dosages merged into Dosages and Protocols → /dosages-and-protocols (WP page ID 144).

footer.disclaimer: © 2026 pep-dose.com · For research and educational purposes only. Not medical advice.
